Ok, i test it a lot and i have some interesting information's:
**1)** DMGamp don't give more couter or poison derived from damage;
**2) **DMGamp give 1=1% more base damage with no demising return (at least not visible at around 110 amp, and the gdoll one is not affected anyway);
**3)** Gdoll give flat damage amp that works like the normal one, 2 cost and exalt stack the flat buff, is only additive to the already present DMGamp, only OE give boost to damage and the counter and poison coming from there;
**4)** Like the damage, fixed poison and counter are affecter with a ratio of 1=1%, with no real demising return;
**5)** Bleed is not affected by DMGamp;

Bonus info for Astral Reign:
**1) **At the end of every turn, if you don't have used an exalt, even if not charged, you get 200% of ALL Keyflare of your team (full Keyflarex2);
**2)** In astral the poison and counter produced by damage, like 24 or pandia, is boosted by 10%, but characters like 24 ultra get 30% less damage from counter (if she normally get 25% of counter as bonus damage, now is like 20% or less).
